description: Updated black pumps made of a plush velvety upper. An all too sweet appeal with the bow detail at the midfoot region. The perfect shoe to class up your simple LBD! Heel: 4" Upper Peep-toe styling with a zippered heel collar and an elasticated midfoot strap with a bow Lightly padded footbed with an embossed branding Outsole TPU outsole with branded grooves on the heel cap Shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
